message.content:
@startuml
title 通行证二维码
participant "巡查app" as 巡查app
participant "小程序或app或管理平台" as 小程序或app或管理平台
participant "lgm_community" as lgm_community
participant "用户中心" as 用户中心
participant "lgm_auth_apps" as lgm_auth_apps
participant "lgm_certauth" as lgm_certauth

== 产生二维码 ==
小程序或app或管理平台->lgm_community: 1 获取通行证二维码
activate lgm_community
lgm_community->lgm_community: 2 根据用户找到实名信息，根据实名信息找到卡号
lgm_community->lgm_auth_apps: 3 获取二维码（实名信息，卡号）
activate lgm_auth_apps
lgm_auth_apps-->lgm_community: 4 返回（二维码）
deactivate lgm_auth_apps
lgm_community-->小程序或app或管理平台: 5 返回
deactivate lgm_community

== 校验二维码 ==
巡查app->lgm_community: 6 扫一扫
activate lgm_community
lgm_community->lgm_community: 7 参考北京通二维码认证流程
lgm_community->lgm_certauth: 8 校验二维码（二维码）
activate lgm_certauth
lgm_certauth-->lgm_community: 9 校验结果
deactivate lgm_certauth
lgm_community->lgm_community: 10 查询客户信息
lgm_community->lgm_community: 11 查询登记信息，按照业主动优先级排序后取一条
lgm_community-->巡查app: 12 返回（登记信息）
deactivate lgm_community
@enduml
